mood: Warm, trustworthy premium Americana — amber warmth meets navy authority with cream comfort
designRules: LAYOUT: StorSafe-classic — dark navy nav with icon dropdowns, photo-overlay hero with frosted glass search card and trust chips, animated stats bar, 4-step process with connector lines, 2x2 full-bleed photo overlay resource cards, feature grid on sand surface, photo gallery with lightbox, testimonial cards with rating breakdown bars, blog cards on dark, newsletter section, gradient CTA banner, multi-column footer with location drawer.

CONVERSION: Facility pages use Layout Option C — top 3-4 popular unit sizes as prominent cards above fold with reserve buttons. Search bar in hero frosted glass card. Market pages show pricing inline.
Promo banner at page top with amber bg, white text, dismiss button — for first-month-free or seasonal offers
Icon dropdowns on Storage Units and Resources nav items with hover reveal animation
Stats bar uses animated number counters on scroll-triggered reveal
Trust chips below hero search card — 'No contracts', 'Move in today', '24/7 access' with check icons
Review section includes rating breakdown bars (96% 5-star, etc.) and platform logos (Google, Yelp)

designPatterns.card: <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-7 border border-surface shadow-card hover:border-primary hover:shadow-warm transition-all">
designPatterns.button: <a className="bg-primary text-white font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl shadow-warm hover:bg-accent transition-all">
designPatterns.buttonSecondary: <a className="border-2 border-surface text-text font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl hover:bg-surface transition-all">
designPatterns.heading: <h2 className="font-heading text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-semibold text-text">
designPatterns.badge: <span className="bg-primary text-white text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full">
designPatterns.input: <input className="w-full border-2 border-surface rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-text placeholder:text-text-muted focus:border-primary transition" />
designPatterns.iconBox: <div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl bg-surface text-primary flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-card">
